nodes.name: tok.py
nodes.summary: Standalone token-usage accounting script that parses Claude and Copilot usage exports, estimates cost, and renders ASCII charts and per-model breakdowns.

nodes.name: parse_claude
nodes.summary: Parses Claude usage export data into normalized per-model token/cost records.

nodes.name: parse_copilot
nodes.summary: Parses Copilot usage export data into normalized per-model usage records.

nodes.name: chart
nodes.summary: Builds the ASCII bar chart visualizing token/cost distribution across models.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Script entry point: parses args, loads Claude/Copilot usage, and renders the combined report.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package marker making the tests directory an importable Python package.

nodes.name: conftest.py
nodes.summary: Shared pytest fixtures for the suite — workspace env isolation, sample markdown/AST/DocumentModel/chunks, and a deterministic model-free hashing_embedder used to exercise the real index->search path in the fast lane.

nodes.name: HashingEmbedder
nodes.summary: Deterministic model-free embedder fixture backing class, embedding chunks/queries via feature hashing so search-contract tests run without a model.

nodes.name: sample_document_model
nodes.summary: Fixture building a representative DocumentModel section tree used across enrichment, chunking, and search tests.

nodes.name: sample_chunks
nodes.summary: Fixture producing a list of SemanticChunks derived from the sample document for chunk/search tests.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package marker for the convert test subpackage.

nodes.name: test_confluence_pf_filter.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the Stage-C panflute filter, asserting admonition/expand/lozenge/layout rewrites and table simplification behaviors (row padding, header folding, pipe escaping, cell line breaks).

nodes.name: test_convert_cli.py
nodes.summary: Tests for the convert CLI command covering the confidence/quarantine verdict, frontmatter emission, the legacy script entry point, and an end-to-end quarantine path.

nodes.name: TestConvertConfidenceVerdict
nodes.summary: Test class verifying the converter confidence-gate verdict logic (quarantine reasons, unrecognized-tag thresholds).

nodes.name: TestConvertFrontmatter
nodes.summary: Test class asserting that the convert command writes YAML-safe frontmatter keys (space/source-url/labels) correctly.

nodes.name: test_html_to_gitlab_md_v3.py
nodes.summary: Comprehensive tests for the HTML->GitLab-Markdown path: chrome/metadata harvest, PFI preprocess rewrites, post-process, TOC flag, corpus examples, and end-to-end chunk hygiene.

nodes.name: TestPfiPreprocess
nodes.summary: Large test class covering the BeautifulSoup PFI pre-clean stage that rewrites Confluence constructs into PFI-HTML carriers.

nodes.name: TestHarvestAndChrome
nodes.summary: Test class verifying page-chrome metadata harvest (title/space/author/date/page_id) before content-root selection.
